biography: Jarkko, affectionately known as "Bailando" among his peers, brings a wealth of experience to the greens of the Hector Trophée. Representing Hirsala Golf, Jarkko's presence is always keenly felt.

A competitor in ten Hector Trophée tournaments, Jarkko has proven his mettle time and again. His career highlight was a victory at one of the past Hector Trophée tournaments, a testament to his skill and composure under pressure. In addition to his success in the pairs format, Jarkko has also distinguished himself as an exceptional individual player, earning the coveted Victor trophy once.

Known for his meticulous approach to the game, Jarkko is admired for his sportsmanship and dedication. As he prepares for the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, anticipation is high to witness the next chapter in Jarkko's already impressive golfing journey.
